data.name: Wild Weekend
data.detailed_description:
Get ready for a weekend you'll never forget! Your girlfriend has an adventurous proposition: why not invite your closest friends – another couple – to your secluded cabin in the woods and try a little "swinging"?

Embark on a three-day escape filled with sun-drenched afternoons, cozy evenings by the fire, and an undeniable tension simmering beneath the surface. Flirt, play games, and navigate the delicate dance of desire as you try to reach for a wild achievement before the holiday ends.

  • Enjoy a Steamy Getaway: Immerse yourself in a mature visual novel and dating sim experience where love, lust, and friendship intertwine.

  • Hand-Painted Beauty: Every piece of art is stunning and meticulously hand-painted, bringing both characters and setting to life.

  • Unlock a series of Erotic Scenes: Indulge in candid, romantic, and explicit moments as things in the cabin heat up.

  • Smooth & Engaging Animations: Watch your choices unfold with seamless animations that add that extra punch to every sizzling embrace.

  • Five Unique Endings: Every decision matters! Explore various dialogues and actions that will set you on course for varied conclusions. Will you find new love, deepen existing bonds, or perhaps something even more unexpected?

Are you ready to take the plunge? Your Wild Weekend awaits!

data.short_description: It's the perfect time to see if you and your girlfriend are ready to be swingers. Make your choices and form your unique experience in Wild Weekend.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.8+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
